description:
On a date

it’s been a long time since 1x has been out in public due to his… less than pleasant tendencies, but you still love him, so you decide to take him out on a date… if he’s on his best behavior.

Established relationship, you guys r dating and live with each other - no forsaken au bc I love my little universe where everyone lives happily ever after

Oh man I really cannot come up with any good ideas rn… which is why I made a straw page for your requests Ik I have over 500 followers now and it’s long overdue so I’m sorry, but it’s finally here - https://therizzlerofoz.straw.page

Idk why everyone’s doing strawpages now instead of google forms but whatever, go my 0 website making skills
